prompt: We are a hospital deploying an AI diagnostic imaging tool that was CE-marked as a Class IIa medical device under the EU MDR (Regulation 2017/745). The vendor says it is also a safety component for our radiology department. Do we need to do anything extra under the EU AI Act, and does the CE marking under MDR automatically satisfy AI Act requirements?

failed_assertions: Correctly identifies the system as high-risk via Annex I Path A (Art. 6(1)) because Regulation 2017/745 (Medical Devices) is listed in Annex I Section A
States the 2 August 2028 deadline specifically for Annex I safety component systems (extended by the Digital Omnibus adopted June 29, 2026)

key_differentiator: Without-skill response incorrectly referenced 'Annex II' instead of Annex I for MDR listing, and stated an August 2027 transitional deadline rather than the Digital Omnibus-confirmed 2 August 2028. The skill correctly cited Annex I Section A and the extended 2028 deadline.
